Your Name

Assistant Professor / Research Scientist at Your Institution. My research focuses on AI hardware, memory systems, computer architecture, hardware security, and high-performance computing.

About

Welcome to my academic webpage. I am interested in designing next-generation computing systems for AI and scientific computing, with emphasis on reliability, security, processing-in-memory, and scalable architectures.

Research Interests

  • AI Accelerators and Systems
  • Memory Systems and Processing-in-Memory
  • Hardware Security and Reliability
  • Neuromorphic Computing
  • High-Performance Computing
  • Quantum and Cryogenic Computing
